2606.30145.title: FacePlex: Full-Duplex Joint Speech-Facial Motion Generation for Conversational Avatars
2606.30145.paper_summary: Natural face-to-face conversation requires real-time speech generation together with synchronized facial motion. Existing systems only partially address this problem: speech-only full-duplex models can generate speech in real time but do not produce facial motion, while audio-driven facial motion models animate a face from already available audio rather than jointly generating speech and motion online. To bridge this gap, we first formalize full-duplex joint speech-facial motion generation, where speech tokens and facial motion tokens are produced together every step. Building on this formulation, we propose FacePlex, a unified streaming framework with two key components. First, Rolling Flow Matching adapts flow matching to online motion generation by committing new motion frames at each streaming step. Second, Rolling Cross-Attention couples the streaming audio queue with the motion queue, allowing speech and facial motion to condition each other as generation progresses. Through extensive experiments, ablation studies, and a user study, we show that FacePlex enables full-duplex joint speech-facial motion generation under online streaming constraints, while achieving stronger lip-sync quality and motion fidelity than audio-driven facial motion baselines.
2606.30145.paper_summary_zh: 自然的面對面對話需要實時的語音生成以及同步的面部動作。現有系統僅部分解決了這個問題：僅語音的全雙工模型可以實時生成語音，但不產生面部動作，而音頻驅動的面部動作模型則是從已經可用的音頻中動畫面，而不是在線共同生成語音和動作。為了填補這一空白，我們首先形式化全雙工的聯合語音-面部動作生成，其中語音標記和面部動作標記在每一步同時生成。在這一公式的基礎上，我們提出了FacePlex，一個統一的流式框架，具有兩個關鍵組件。首先，Rolling Flow Matching 將流匹配適應於在線動作生成，通過在每個流式步驟中提交新的動作幀。其次，Rolling Cross-Attention 將流式音頻隊列與動作隊列結合起來，使語音和面部動作在生成過程中相互影響。通過廣泛的實驗、消融研究和用戶研究，我們表明 FacePlex 能夠在在線流媒體限制下實現全雙工的聯合語音-面部動作生成，同時實現比音頻驅動的面部動作基準更強的嘴型同步質量和動作保真度。
2606.30145.author: Habin Lim et.al.
2606.30145.authors: Habin Lim, Jae-Ho Lee, Hah Min Lew, Ji-Su Kang, Gyeong-Moon Park
